scanner_blind_spots.reason: Scanner saw negative Q1 comps and skipped. Research identified Iran-linked Handala cyberattack shut Stryker manufacturing for 3 weeks — a 100% one-time identifiable external event. Full-year guidance maintained at 8-9.5% organic growth. RSI hit 21.85. $4.9B FCF. The scanner cannot distinguish between structural impairment and one-time event-driven misses. STRONG BUY 27.8% below high.

Scanner excluded due to negative TTM FCF (-$459M) and elevated P/E — classic backwards-looking metrics for a utility in a high-capex investment year. Forward FCF guide $3.9-4.7B (just reaffirmed today in Q1 2026 results). Fitch upgraded to investment grade. Meta+AWS 20-year PPAs provide unprecedented cash flow visibility. Scanner cannot assess forward FCF profiles vs TTM data. STRONG BUY.

Scanner's energy coverage focuses on oil-weighted names with catalyst patterns. EQT is natural gas, boring by scanner metrics. Discovery found a unique AI/data-center demand thesis: EQT is signing multi-Bcf/day supply agreements for new Appalachian data center campuses. The energy-AI infrastructure nexus is the scanner's structural blind spot. At P/E 10.9 and 7% FCF yield, this is underpriced regardless of the data center thesis. STRONG BUY.

Scanner saw P/E 21.7 (not cheap by its filter) and TTM earnings growth -11.8% — skipped as underperforming medtech. Forward P/E is 12.8x. 50 consecutive years of dividend growth. At 52W low with Q4 earnings catalyst June 3. Scanner cannot capture 'upcoming earnings as inflection catalyst for trough-multiple dividend compounder.' STRONG BUY.

L3Harris organic revenue growth appears modest without geopolitical context. Scanner missed the $40B backlog (doubled), 1.4x book-to-bill for 4+ quarters, HPTSS hypersonic tracking system award, and the $25B Munitions Acceleration Council pipeline that is NOT YET in backlog. This pre-booking pipeline is invisible to any fundamental screen. BUY.

Scanner likely excludes utilities as a category or requires different catalyst patterns. Constellation is a unique nuclear+gas power company with $16.4B Calpine acquisition closed, Meta+Microsoft nuclear PPAs signed, and Q1 earnings in 4 days (May 11). Scanner cannot track imminent earnings as entry triggers for utility-category companies. BUY.
